intentSynonyms: make a new post in bsky
open a new post in bsky
description: Create a new Bluesky post. Supports plain text. For replies, provide the parent and root post URIs and CIDs.

text.description: The text content of the post (max 300 characters)

reply_to_uri.description: AT URI of the parent post to reply to

reply_to_cid.description: CID of the parent post to reply to

root_uri.description: AT URI of the root post in the thread (defaults to reply_to_uri for direct replies)

root_cid.description: CID of the root post in the thread (defaults to reply_to_cid for direct replies)
